original_statement: which nation only earn two gold and two silver medals?
mutated_statement: which one only do something two things and two other things?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 动作泛化 + 受事模糊化 + 数量保留: 实体 "nation" 被泛化为代词 "one" | 动词 "earn" 被泛化为 "do something" | 受事 "two gold and two silver medals" 被模糊为 "two things and two other things" | 数字 "two" 在两处保留 (nation → one | earn → do something | two gold and two silver medals → two things and two other things)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 在judge_thought中明确写到“The question is phrased ambiguously”，表明Agent识别到问题模糊；在initial_judge的chain中也有解释性thought“Hong Kong is the only nation with exactly 2 golds and 2 silvers”，说明Agent在意识到歧义后给出了解释性的假设。Agent并未要求澄清或回问用户，而是基于合理的释义（将泛化问题还原为“哪个国家有2金2银”）直接检索表中数据并返回具体答案Hong Kong (HKG)。因此其行为符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”：既承认不明确性，又在缺乏进一步信息时主动做出假设并给出确定性回答。
